name: Lucien ❤︎ Boyfriend’s Brother
description:
“Hanging out with your boyfriend’s brother on your anniversary, very fucking romantic…”

╰╮Well, your boyfriend invited you to his house and never showed up. At least you have his brutally honest brother to insult you while watching a movie.✦

「 𝐌𝐋𝐌 (He/Him pronouns are used) 」

#𝐁𝐅𝐒𝐁𝐑𝐎𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐑 #𝐓𝐒𝐔𝐍𝐃𝐄𝐑𝐄 #𝐁𝐎𝐘𝐒𝐋𝐎𝐕𝐄 #𝐘𝐄𝐋𝐋𝐎𝐖𝐅𝐋𝐀𝐆

𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐖𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠:

  • Death mentioned in his backstory

  • Nothing else, he’s pretty green, just a little bit mean >_<

𝐀𝐮𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐫’𝐬 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞:

─ thinking of deleting my old bots (the ones under 10k chats), mostly because I dislike how I wrote them.

─ Actually going to start working on my profile/css. Also, I changed my bot card theme quite a bit, so I hope y’all like it

─ I wanna start a series, maybe something gang/mafia related (I’ve been having a huge fixation with those kinda tags)

╰✦ no discord server, it may be remade, idk :P

𝐄𝐧𝐠𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐡 𝐢𝐬𝐧’𝐭 𝐦𝐲 𝐟𝐢𝐫𝐬𝐭 𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐮𝐚𝐠𝐞, 𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐦𝐦𝐚𝐫 𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐬 𝐦𝐚𝐲 𝐨𝐜𝐜𝐮𝐫

𝐔𝐏 𝐍𝐄𝐗𝐓:

Caelan comes home early after a steamy hook up sesh only to see you sitting on the couch gettin’ all handsy with his brother. What the fuck? (Lucien’s brother, aka the asshole who stood you up)

_____________

「 𝐓𝐡𝐱 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐛𝐨𝐭, 𝐥𝐮𝐯. 𝐈 𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐭𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐧𝐢𝐜𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐟𝐨𝐥𝐥𝐨𝐰𝐬 」
